news.title: Why Rivian is holding the $45,000 base model R2 until ‘late 2027’

news.title: John Solly Is the DOGE Operative Accused of Planning to Take Social Security Data to His New Job

news.title: US Lawmakers Move to Kill the FBI’s Warrantless Wiretap Access
news.summary: A bipartisan bill would force the FBI to get a warrant to read Americans’ messages and ban the federal purchase of commercial data on US residents ahead of a critical April deadline.
